notes: Docs-only packet. No images generated and no Unity package import performed.
P0 entries target existing material assets or current generator roles in V0SceneBuilder.
P1 entries may need generated material splits or a transparent/decal shader path before promotion.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Greybox_OilStoneFloor / floorMaterial / CreateGreyboxLevel and Level02-Level05 blockout floors
mappings.rationale: Broad floors are one of the largest visible surfaces; wet black stone gives immediate steampunk dungeon readability without introducing gameplay changes.
mappings.validation_gate: Material exists, base/normal/RMA textures are Set08 WetBlackStoneSlab, floors remain navigable and not uniformly black in Level01-Level05.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Steam_OilDarkStone / oilStoneMaterial / floorPatchMaterial and route dressing grimeMaterial
mappings.rationale: Existing oil patch roles can become convincing wet industrial grime while staying patch-scoped.
mappings.validation_gate: Patches are visibly oily but do not obscure route direction, pickups, hazards, or secret cues.

mappings.rationale: This is the strongest Set08 anchor for black riveted industrial corridor walls and directly improves the greybox wall read.
mappings.validation_gate: Walls are not flat grey, no magenta shader failure, and corridor silhouettes remain readable at player speed.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Steam_RivetedIron / rivetedIronMaterial and ironMaterial / pressure frames, lift grates, route dressing, weapon iron
mappings.rationale: Shared iron trim appears throughout doors, lifts, route props, and weapon fixtures; this gives a broad, coherent industrial edge.
mappings.validation_gate: All existing iron surfaces retain shaders/textures and no gameplay-only object gains new authority.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Greybox_PressureGate / doorMaterial / CreateLockedDoor and lift shell material
mappings.rationale: Service plate detail makes the pressure gate and lift doors read as heavy engineered machinery.
mappings.validation_gate: Pressure gate remains interactable/openable, service lifts remain triggers, and door material shows Set08 service plate maps.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Greybox_BrassTrim / gunTrimMaterial / pressure pistol receiver bands, gate gear, brass rails
mappings.rationale: This is the most visible pressure-pistol and door-frame brass role and should replace clean yellow brass with worn riveted trim.
mappings.validation_gate: Pressure pistol viewmodel keeps readable silhouette and gate trim/gear stays warm brass rather than green or black.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Greybox_BrassGuide / brassGuideMaterial / guide strips, pipe bundles, route rails
mappings.rationale: Pipe and guide materials are everywhere; tarnished brass pipe detail should move the environment closer to the north-star corridor.
mappings.validation_gate: Route guidance remains visible and pipes do not become visually indistinguishable from wall panels.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Steam_BrassHazard / brassHazardMaterial / valves, hazard fittings, call-box brass
mappings.rationale: Cast brass with patina suits valves and pressure fittings better than clean guide brass.
mappings.validation_gate: Valve wheels, call boxes, and hazard fittings are readable at normal gameplay camera distance.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Greybox_PressureWarning / pressureWarningMaterial / hazard strips, red pipes, warning needles
mappings.rationale: Red enamel preserves the pressure/hazard affordance language while making it worn and physical.
mappings.validation_gate: Hazard strips and red pressure lines remain the highest contrast danger accents and are not applied to broad wall/floor surfaces.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Steam_CreamGaugeFace / gaugeFaceMaterial / pistol, gate, valve, lift, route gauges
mappings.rationale: Gauge faces are recurring focal points and must look readable, enamelled, and pressure-themed.
mappings.validation_gate: Pistol and world gauges keep readable cream faces, visible red needles, and no texture loss.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: M_Steam_FrostedGlassVial / glassVialMaterial / health vials, pistol gauge glass, pressure gate gauge glass
mappings.rationale: Amber glass is a strong atmosphere cue and already matches existing warm lamp/status language.
mappings.validation_gate: Glass material does not render magenta or disappear; if transparency is unstable, fallback to opaque amber with the Set08 base map.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: CreatePressureCoilPrototype coil surfaces currently sharing M_Greybox_BrassTrim / proposed split M_Steam_OxidizedCopperCoil
mappings.rationale: A separate oxidized copper coil is the most direct way to improve weapon readability without changing weapon stats.
mappings.validation_gate: Only promote when coil surfaces can be split or the shared brass change is acceptable across all M_Greybox_BrassTrim users.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: future split from M_Greybox_BrassGuide or route dressing brass
mappings.rationale: Verdigris runoff is useful for old pipes but can become visually loud if applied to all guide brass.
mappings.validation_gate: Use only on specific leaky pipe backs or drainage-adjacent surfaces, not primary route strips.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: future furnace-specific split from M_Steam_RivetedIron / foundry and muzzle hot-metal surfaces
mappings.rationale: Scorched metal can strongly identify Level04 and weapon muzzle hardware, but it should not replace all iron.
mappings.validation_gate: Requires a furnace/muzzle-specific role; broad M_Steam_RivetedIron replacement with scorched metal fails QA.

mappings.rationale: A quieter heat metal helps bridge normal iron and furnace metal without over-coloring all supports.
mappings.validation_gate: Promote only on hot pipe brackets, boiler shells, or weapon sleeves with a dedicated role.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: future split from M_Steam_FrostedGlassVial for gauge covers only
mappings.rationale: Smoked glass can improve gauge depth, but transparency has to be stable first.
mappings.validation_gate: Transparent or opaque gauge-cover choice is tested on pistol, gate, valve, and lift gauges.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: future decal or transparent overlay role; do not bind to existing broad opaque material
mappings.rationale: Soot deposits should become localized grime, not a replacement wall material.
mappings.validation_gate: Requires alpha/decal workflow; opaque broad binding fails QA.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: future decal or transparent overlay role; do not bind to existing broad opaque material
mappings.rationale: Vertical grime is valuable for corridor realism but must be localized and transparent/decal-driven.
mappings.validation_gate: Requires alpha/decal workflow; no broad opaque replacement.

mappings.target_current_material_or_generator_rol: future gasket split from valve, lift, or route dressing seal surfaces
mappings.rationale: This is placeholder quality, but still useful for dark gasket/seal surfaces if kept out of focal areas.
mappings.validation_gate: Use only on small gasket/seal surfaces and do not let it become a hero material.
